allow: PowerShell(@\("ap-southeast-1","ap-south-1","us-east-1","eu-west-2","ap-northeast-1"\) | ForEach-Object { $h = "aws-0-$_.pooler.supabase.com"; try { $r = Resolve-DnsName $h -ErrorAction Stop; "$h -> $\($r[0].IPAddress\)" } catch { "$h -> no record" } })

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Sakshi Kananthoor\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub\\sakshi-kjogi.github.io\\FoodFusion\\backend"; $dsn = "postgresql://postgres.bkcxwmexmdyottccflha:Sakshi%259482@aws-0-ap-southeast-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres"; for \($i=1; $i -le 20; $i++\) { $out = .\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe test_connection.py $dsn 2>&1 | Select-String "SUCCESS|FAILED"; Write-Host "[$\(Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss'\)] Attempt $i`: $out"; if \($out -match "SUCCESS"\) { break }; Start-Sleep 15 })
